'''Kruqr''' was a scrawny [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] security guard on the ''[[Errant Venture/Legends|Errant Venture]]'' around [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
